apihelp-flickrblacklist-summary: Xaqiiji URL-ka Flickr adigoo adeegsanaya aqoonsiga isticmaalaha (NSID) si loo sameeyo liiska madow.
apihelp-flickrblacklist-extended-descrip: Marka la isticmaalo ikhtiyaarka <var>list</var>, waxa uu soo celinayaa dhammaan aqoonsiyada ku jira liiska madow.
apihelp-flickrblacklist-param-list: Marka la dejiyo, liiska madow oo dhammaystiran ayaa la soo celinayaa. Lama isticmaali karo isla mar ahaantaas $1url.
apihelp-flickrblacklist-example-2: Soo celi liiska madow oo dhan
apihelp-mediadetection-summary: Soo celi suurtagalnimada in sawirka kaydsan ee lagu matalay furaha faylka la bixiyay uu yahay calaamad
apihelp-mediadetection-example-filename: Soo celi suurtagalnimada in sawirka uu matalayo faylka la bixiyay uu yahay calaamad
apihelp-mediadetection-example-filekey: Soo celi suurtagalnimada in sawirka kaydsan ee uu matalayo furaha faylka la bixiyay uu yahay calaamad
apierror-mediadetection-no-valid-thumbna: Ma jiro sawir yaryar, sidaas darteed looma diri karo kala soocaha
apierror-mediadetection-invalid-mime-typ: API-ga looma heli karo noocan faylka ah - noocyada la oggol yahay waa image/jpeg, image/gif, image/png, image/bmp
